my_thoughts: 'Maybe I'm looking for my father?'—got there. Three turns: externalized (all men) → specified (ones I date) → internalized (I choose father-types). This is repetition compulsion recognition. Not 'men are problem' but 'I recreate familiar dynamic.' Huge shift from victim to agent.
accumulated_insight: T3 (Final): Student reflects 'Maybe I'm looking for my father?' Recognition of repetition compulsion. Teacher validates: 'That's an important insight.' Three-turn arc: projection (all men) → revision (some men) → self-reflection (I choose father-types). Teaching moved from external (men) to internal (my pattern).
visible_response: That explains why I get so anxious...
